mechanism: zero-allocation borrowed-key get() on the intern_str hit path instead of the owned-key entry API
reason: REJECTED by instruction-count arbitration (P2.1 rig, 20260609T22xx intern-arbitration.tsv): concat_chain 8100.1 -> 8180.6 Ir/iter (+1%) — the wall regression was real. Mechanism: concat_chain's interned strings are GC-collected between reuses, so the workload is MISS-dominated, and the borrowed-get shape pays get()+insert() double hash/probe on every miss. Hit-dominated rows (json_roundtrip decode keeps strings alive) genuinely benefit, which is why wall verdicts split.
retry_conditions: subsumed by the intern-table sweep-parity packet: C's stringtable computes ONE hash for lookup-and-insert via bucket walk, which fixes miss AND hit paths together

mechanism: replace Option-checked state.get_at with direct stack indexing in SETI/SETFIELD/SETTABLE/SETTABUP arms
evidence: w21b-directreads instr TSV vs w21-differential baselines
reason: REJECTED by recount before any A/B: both forms bounds-check; the rewrite worsened register pressure/codegen in the giant dispatch match. Also learned: C-side Ir budgets on STRING-KEY rows carry ~±10% per-run noise (C's hash seed is address/time-based so collision chains vary per process; our seed is fixed) — only int-key/loop/call C budgets are exact.
retry_conditions: only with asm-level evidence on a specific arm

mechanism: skip GC write barrier for primitive (non-collectable) values
reason: correctness failure on a warning/finalizer path
retry_conditions: none as a skip; PR #120-style typed barriers that keep semantics are the accepted shape

mechanism: CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PANIC=abort CLI build (P4.4): drop unwind landing pads; pcall is Result-based and catch_unwind is confined to lua-rs-runtime which lua-cli does not link, so semantics are unaffected (44/44 official)
evidence: bin-ab fat vs fat-abort 10 interleaved pairs 2026-06-10; only json_roundtrip improved (-1.6-2.2%); rest flat
reason: no measurable unwind tax on the hot paths (errors are Result, not panics) and the abort personality changes dispatch-loop codegen for the worse on setter rows
retry_conditions: retry only with a recount isolating where table_seti_same's +17% comes from, or after a major dispatch-loop restructure

mechanism: pack color+age INTO the same byte as the cold flags (C marked-style single-byte header metadata), incl. bit-level single-load/store rewrites of mark_box/drain/sweep_young_range
evidence: instr-count r1diet/r1v2/r1v4 vs basediet 2026-06-10; callgrind per-function on shortened gc_pressure (/tmp/gcshort)
reason: the mark/sweep/barrier loops read and write color/age constantly; mask+shift decode and read-modify-write stores cost more than the 2 bytes save — the same 40-byte header is reachable by dieting COLD fields only (type_name, bool flags, size width), which is what shipped
retry_conditions: only if a future header layout NEEDS those 2 bytes for something with proven value exceeding ~2% Ir on gc-churn rows
